message:
fix(fr-command): XINFO GROUPS/CONSUMERS emit RESP3 Map per entry [bd-frankenredis-f6z6 partial]

Upstream Redis 7.2 t_stream.c::xinfoCommand uses addReplyMapLen
for each per-group / per-consumer entry in XINFO GROUPS / XINFO
CONSUMERS replies (and within the FULL stream-info groups
sub-array). fr's stream_group_info_to_frame /
stream_consumer_info_to_frame always returned alternating-array.

Now thread the session.resp_protocol_version through both
helpers and emit RespFrame::Map(Some(pairs)) for RESP3 callers.
RESP2 callers continue to receive the alternating-array form.

Verified via 'redis-cli -3 XINFO GROUPS s' against vendored
redis 7.2.4: fr now emits 'name g1\nconsumers 0\n...'
(map-style display) matching upstream byte-for-byte.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
